title: The Annotated Paddock Boundary

features.name: post catalogue
features.desc-on-touch: A standing directory of every marked post. The annotations accumulate. The boundary is written in the margins of itself.

features.name: coordinate resonance
features.desc-on-touch: Each post broadcasts its position. The paddock hums with overlapping coordinates. Boundary and interior have begun to compare themselves.

features.name: intent sediment
features.desc-on-touch: Layers of measurement: where the depot imagined the post, where it was driven, where it will stand after. The corruption loves this palimpsest.

features.name: reading-marks
features.desc-on-touch: Pencil-strokes on bark, nicks from a blade, paint-numbers fading. The marks are a language the boundary is teaching itself to speak.

features.name: depot memory
features.desc-on-touch: The paddock remembers the depot room where these posts began as ideas. Now the idea and the object are separated by soil and weather.

inscription: every line on the map had to pass through this place first; now the boundary is annotating itself

file.name: Post_Marks_1987_to_2003.txt
file.note: A ledger of boundary posts as they were marked at the depot before installation. The paddock is slowly rewriting the entries.

exits.label: back to where intent becomes object
deeper into the marked field, where posts talk to each other
toward the forest where unmarked land begins
